title: Support multidimensional instances/interfaces
body: version - Verilator 5.018 2023-10-30 rev run as part of efabless/openlane2 Why standard declaration of multidimesional interfaces not supported? ``` Unsupported: Multidimensional instances/interfaces. 41 | router_if north_net [ROUTER_ROWS-1:0][ROUTER_COLS-1:0] (); ```
